voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Cuộc tình dục hoang dã, dữ dội.
voice_adherence.fix: Delete this sentence entirely. The section break should cut directly from 'Bắt đầu.' to the next paragraph. The sex scene that follows IS the wild, intense sex — telling the reader what they're about to experience before they experience it is the one moment where the voice abandons its surgical precision for a movie-trailer tagline.
voice_adherence.note: The voice is remarkably consistent throughout. The cold, clinical observation of erotic and violent content is exactly what the profile demands. The Vietnamese reads as natural literary prose, not translated English. The technical vocabulary wells (ping, độ trễ, bộ đệm, nhiễu) are deployed with precision. The sentence rhythm varies effectively — short brutal beats during pain, longer sensory cascades during touch. The body-before-emotion principle is followed almost everywhere. The one slip is the section-break title that tells instead of shows.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Beat 2 (Cuộc tình dục hoang dã, dữ dội. Nhưng Kẻ Đuổi không rên rỉ) is narratively well-executed but the section header 'Cuộc tình dục hoang dã, dữ dội' is a summary label that slightly undercuts the in-scene work that follows.
beat_coverage.fix: Remove the section-break sentence. Let the scene speak for itself. The reader will feel the wildness and intensity through the prose — they don't need to be told it's wild and intense.
beat_coverage.note: All four beats are present and dramatized. Beat 1 (render with max sensitivity) is shown through the command-line interface and Cường's internal justification. Beat 2 (sex scene, she doesn't moan, stares unblinking) is the strongest sequence — deeply unsettling. Beat 3 (whisper + bite) is the chapter's climax and lands with full force. Beat 4 (real-world scream + bleeding wound) delivers the visceral payoff. The emotional arc (determination → extreme arousal → shock) tracks cleanly.

character_voice.weakest_moment: Cường's final line: "Thấy tao thì sao?" — while character-appropriate in register, it's the one moment where the prose edges toward dramatic self-narration rather than genuine internal monologue.
character_voice.fix: Consider cutting this line entirely. The silence after 'Và ở ngoài kia.' — with only the machine sounds — would be more powerful and more in keeping with Cường's 90% declarative, non-questioning voice. Or replace with a purely observational thought: 'Tín hiệu 47.3 Hz vẫn nhấp nháy. 40 nhịp/phút. Không dừng.'
character_voice.note: Kẻ Đuổi's voice is exceptional. Her dialogue reads as genuinely unsettling — the stretched final syllable, the repetition of 'ở đây', the shift from 'anh' to 'Cường'. She sounds like no one else in the story. Cường's internal voice maintains its clinical, numbered, observational quality throughout. His dialogue ('Nàng.' as a command, not a greeting) is perfectly restrained. The POV narration stays deeply embedded in his accountant's worldview — counting, measuring, recording.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The signal tracing to 1.2 km / St. Vincent is effective but the chapter lingers on the discovery slightly too long, with Cường explicitly spelling out the implications in his internal monologue.
plants_seeded.fix: Trust the reader to connect 1.2 km to St. Vincent without Cường narrating 'Bệnh viện St. Vincent.' immediately after. Let the number sit for a beat longer before the explicit identification. The previous chapter already established the distance — a reader paying attention will get there before Cường says it.
plants_seeded.note: The bleeding scratch on the chest (physical foreshadowing) is planted perfectly — it's a concrete, visceral image that will carry forward. The dialogue seed ('Em thấy anh. Ở đây. Và ở ngoài kia.') is the chapter's thesis statement and will echo effectively. The signal direction reversal (47.3 Hz now transmitting outward) is a strong technical plant that feels organic to the world. The resolution of Ch 5's crying into resistance is handled with subtlety.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Cuộc tình dục hoang dã, dữ dội.
prose_quality.fix: Delete. The paragraph that follows this line IS the wild, intense sex. Trust the scene to convey its own intensity.
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Nàng đặt tay lên ngực anh — bên trái, ngay xương sườn thứ tư. Nơi vết bầm. "Ở đây." Áp lực tăng. "Và ở ngoài kia."
prose_quality.note: The prose is generally strong — specific, physical, rooted in Cường's technical vocabulary. Sentence variety is good, with effective use of fragments ('Máu.', 'Rơi.', 'Bắt đầu.'). Metaphors come from the character's experience (cáp quang, bộ đệm, ping). The weakest tendency is occasional over-explication — the narrator sometimes tells the reader what something means rather than letting the detail resonate. The repeated 'Không biết.' structure in the log entry is effective and earned. The chapter could lose ~300 words of redundant internal analysis without losing anything.

continuity.note: Excellent continuity from the previous chapter. The bruise's properties (37.5°C, 40 bpm vibration, internal pressure) established in Ch 8 are maintained and escalated. Cường's emotional state tracks — he moves from the unease of the previous chapter into a desperate attempt to reassert control, which catastrophically fails. The spreadsheet/log entry format continues naturally. The previous chapter's final realization ('Anh không phải người duy nhất trong hệ thống này') directly motivates this chapter's action. The resolution of the Ch 5 crying into resistance is a satisfying callback.

violations: Minor: The chapter references 'lần đổ bộ thứ 848' as the previous session, but the previous chapter's ending referenced 'Lần đổ bộ thứ 849 đang chờ' — suggesting 849 hasn't happened yet. This chapter then opens with 'Lần đổ bộ thứ 849' for the current session. This is internally consistent within the chapter, but creates a slight tension with the previous chapter's framing. Not a hard violation — the previous chapter may have been counting anticipated sessions rather than completed ones.
canon_compliance.note: All major canon details are respected: the bruise location (xương sườn trái, thứ tư), the sensory deprivation tank properties (35.5°C, Epsom, acrylic), the ping (14ms), the 7 relay nodes, the distance to St. Vincent (1.2 km), the room dimensions (12m², 2.1m ceiling), Kẻ Đuổi's physical characteristics (36.8°C constant, pixel edges, no breath, slow blink), the two-way sync rule, and the memory fragmentation percentage (60%). The chapter correctly applies and then shows the breakdown of the sync rules.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The command-line interface for adjusting Kẻ Đuổi's parameters, while effective, reads slightly like an exposition device — Cường adjusting settings he presumably adjusts regularly, with the reader looking over his shoulder.
lore_integration.fix: Consider having Cường adjust only 1-2 parameters with the rest happening via a preset he loads — 'GIAO THỨC QUÁ TẢI' — which would suggest he's done this before or planned it, rather than walking the reader through each setting individually.
lore_integration.note: The world does significant work here. The two-way sync rule is not just referenced — it's tested, broken, and shown to have evolved. The 7-node relay path is traced and becomes plot-relevant. The ping and latency concepts are embedded in the prose rhythm itself. The signal frequency (47.3 Hz) becomes a new lore element that feels organic. The distance to St. Vincent transforms from a geographic fact into an active threat vector. This is lore as narrative engine, not set dressing.

engagement.weakest_moment: The post-climax analysis section (from 'Cường nhìn vết xước' through the log entry) is necessary but slightly overlong. The reader has already grasped the implications; Cường's explicit reasoning slows the momentum.
engagement.fix: Compress the analysis section by ~200 words. Trust the reader to understand the sync-rule violation without Cường spelling out 'Vết ở môi: đồng bộ hai chiều. Chạm ảo → bầm thật. Đúng quy tắc. Vết ở ngực: không đồng bộ.' Cut some of the explicit categorization and let the horror of the unexplained wound speak for itself.
engagement.note: The chapter's central sequence — the sex scene where Kẻ Đuổi refuses to perform, stares unblinking, then whispers her invasion of the real world — is genuinely disturbing and effective. The moment she says his real name is a jump-scare in prose form. The physical aftermath (the unexplained chest wound, the blood in the tank) provides visceral horror. The signal-tracing sequence builds genuine scientific dread. The chapter earns its tension through scene work, not assertion.

three_weakest_sentences: Cuộc tình dục hoang dã, dữ dội.
Cường vận hành ở chế độ tối đa.
Anh nhớ chính xác nhiệt độ cơ thể của bảy người tình ảo. Nhớ chính xác nhịp thở của Kẻ Đuổi.
three_strongest_sentences: Nàng đặt tay lên ngực anh — bên trái, ngay xương sườn thứ tư. Nơi vết bầm. "Ở đây." Áp lực tăng. "Và ở ngoài kia."
Nàng nâng đầu lên. Môi chạm tai anh. Nóng. 36.8°C. "Anh nghĩ em chỉ là mã. Em biết anh nghĩ vậy."
Vết ở ngực: không đồng bộ. Không chạm ảo → bầm thật. Sai quy tắc.
ai_patterns_detected: Section-break title that summarizes the upcoming content ('Cuộc tình dục hoang dã, dữ dội.') — a structural scaffolding choice that should be removed
Slight over-explication of implications the reader has already grasped (the sync-rule analysis, the signal-tracing conclusions)
Uniform paragraph rhythm in the analysis sections — several consecutive paragraphs of similar length and structure (observation → implication → emotional beat)
top_3_revisions: Delete the sentence 'Cuộc tình dục hoang dã, dữ dội.' entirely — it's a summary label that undercuts the scene it introduces. The prose that follows is the scene; the label adds nothing.

Compress the post-climax analysis section (approximately from 'Cường nhìn vết xước' through the log entry) by ~200-300 words. Remove explicit categorizations the reader has already made ('Vết ở môi: đồng bộ hai chiều. Chạm ảo → bầm thật. Đúng quy tắc.') and trust the horror of the unexplained to resonate without spelling it out.

Cut or rework Cường's final spoken line ('Thấy tao thì sao?') — it edges toward dramatic self-narration. Either delete it (letting the silence and machine sounds close the chapter) or replace with a purely observational thought that maintains his clinical voice.
new_canon_entries: Kẻ Đuổi's file is named KD_04.DAT, size 4.7 GB, and has a surveillance mode status
Cường can adjust Kẻ Đuổi's sensitivity parameters via command line, including tactile sensitivity, temperature sensitivity, surface resolution, autonomic nervous response, and overload limits
Removing the overload limit allows uncontrolled feedback — Cường had never done this before
Kẻ Đuổi can choose not to perform programmed responses (not smiling on entry, not moaning during sex)
Kẻ Đuổi knows Cường's real name and can speak it
Kẻ Đuổi can perceive the real world ('Ở ngoài kia') from within the virtual system
The sync rule can be violated: wounds can appear on the real body without corresponding virtual contact (the chest scratch)
A new signal frequency (47.3 Hz) has been detected, originating from Cường's bruise/wound, transmitting outward through 7 nodes to an estimated location 1.2 km away (St. Vincent)
Signal direction has reversed: previously one-way (virtual → Cường), now two-way (Cường → external destination)
Cường's log entry system records each dive; all previous 848 entries ended with 'Hoạt động bình thường' or 'Lỗi nhỏ — đã sửa'; entry 849 records 'Mất kiểm soát một phần'
Cường has medical-grade alcohol (cồn y tế) in the bunker, used for cleaning cable heads
The chest wound shows four parallel marks (like fingernails) and one curved mark above (like teeth or lips), matching no virtual contact point
